title: PIL in Supreme Court seeks CBI probe into Vijay's TVK trust vote win
description: A public interest litigation (PIL) has been filed before the Supreme Court alleging irregularities and corruption in the Tamil Nadu Assembly trust vote held on May 13 in which Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), led by current Chief Minister C Joseph Vijay, emerged victorious [KK Ramesh v. Union of India]The petition filed by Madurai resident KK Ramesh has sought a probe by the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) into the same.Ramesh has also sought a direction for imposition of President's rule i
